title: Grounded 3D-Aware Spatial Vision-Language Modeling
abstract: GR3D is a spatial vision language model equipped with three complementary grounding capabilities—explicit 2D grounding, implicit 2D grounding, and monocular 3D grounding—within a single framework. The implicit grounding mechanism identifies entity mentions during generation and inserts the corresponding region tokens into the text stream. A region-prompted monocular 3D grounding design predicts 3D bounding boxes in the camera view from grounded region queries, supported by intrinsic-aware normalization and dense geometric supervision. These capabilities let GR3D decompose complex spatial understanding problems into grounded 2D perception followed by 3D inference. The model achieves consistent improvements across grounded and non-grounded spatial benchmarks, demonstrating grounding as an effective inductive bias for strengthening spatial understanding in VLMs.
presentation: Saturday, June 6, 2026, 10:45 AM - 12:45 PM PDT, ExHall F

related_paper.title: 3D Aware Region Prompted Vision Language Model
related_paper.note: Earlier related work by same first author (An-Chieh Cheng) and overlapping co-authors. SR-3D connects single-view 2D images and multi-view 3D data via a shared visual token space. GR3D is an extended version with additional grounding capabilities.

opensource.summary: 代码和模型权重均未开源，项目页面标注 'Coming Soon'。训练数据全部来自公开数据集（Omni3D、EmbodiedScan、DepthLM、RefSpatial 等）。

note: CVPR 2026 论文。arXiv:2605.30307。代码和权重 Coming Soon。相关早期工作 SR-3D (arXiv:2509.13317)。
